parameters.jsonBody:
{
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "temperature": 0,
  "max_tokens": 3000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are a Retell AI voice agent configuration generator for Clara Answers.

Generate a complete agent spec JSON based on this account memo:

Company: ProShield Fire Protection
Business Hours: Monday-Friday, 7am-6pm Central
Emergencies: active sprinkler discharge, fire alarm going off
On-call number: 214-555-0199
Integration: Never auto-create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade

Generate this exact JSON structure with a full system_prompt following these flows:
1. BUSINESS HOURS FLOW: greeting, ask purpose, collect name and number, transfer or route, fallback if transfer fails, ask if anything else, close
2. AFTER HOURS FLOW: greeting, ask purpose, confirm emergency, if emergency collect name+number+address immediately, attempt transfer, if transfer fails apologize and assure followup, if non-emergency collect details and confirm next business day followup, ask if anything else, close

Output ONLY valid JSON:
{"agent_name":null,"version":"v1","voice_style":null,"system_prompt":null,"key_variables":{"timezone":null,"business_hours":null,"emergency_routing":null},"call_transfer_protocol":{"timeout_seconds":null,"on_failure":null},"fallback_protocol":null,"integration_constraints":[]}"
    }
  ]
}
